title: cyanotis scaberula
intro: Cyanotis scaberula, also known as the lesser cyanotis, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Commelinaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyanotis scaberula include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
